nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 塔毛利帕斯州
nodes.summary: 塔毛利帕斯州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联11种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、Scaled quail、普通潜鸟等11种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 非法猎捕
nodes.summary: 直接捕杀或非法贸易导致种群下降。

nodes.name: Olive-throated parakeet
nodes.summary: Olive-throated parakeet（Olive-throated parakeet，学名 Eupsittula nana），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于塔毛利帕斯州、韋拉克魯斯州，常见栖息地包括灌丛，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、非法猎捕。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 韋拉克魯斯州
nodes.summary: 韋拉克魯斯州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联22种鸟类，包括灰胸穴䳍、Tawny-collared nightjar、纹喉隐蜂鸟等22种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: vicinalis is found in northeastern Mexico from Tamaulipas to northern Veracruz

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: vicinalis is found in northeastern Mexico from Tamaulipas to northern Veracruz

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It also inhabits the interior and edges of humid forest, riparian areas, scrublands, and more open landscapes such as plantations, clearings with trees, and gardens

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "Habitat loss and fragmentation are perhaps the greatest on-going threats"

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Some small-scale poaching for food and the pet trade contribute to the decline. It is considered common and widespread in Jamaica but is persecuted as a crop pest
